source_pr.title: seqtest: migrate test-infra testify
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: tison <wander4096@gmail.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28076

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: rss, err := tk.Session().Execute(ctx, "select * from earlyclose order by id") (executor/seqtest/seq_executor_serial_test.go)
failure_signature: rss, err := tk.Session().Execute(ctx, "select * from earlyclose order by id") (executor/seqtest/seq_executor_serial_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test suite was flaky due to issues around legacy go-check based test infrastructure and suite setup. This PR stabilizes it by migrating seqtest from pingcap/check to testify, adding a dedicated TestMain (testbridge + goleak) and restructuring the serial tests to follow standard Go testing patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate seqtest from go-check to testify and add TestMain/goleak verification to improve suite setup/teardown reliability and reduce framework-related flakes.

evidence: evidence: rss, err := tk.Session().Execute(ctx, "select * from earlyclose order by id") (executor/seqtest/seq_executor_serial_test.go)
